task_completion.description: View existing Wazuh Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) scan results
task_completion.visual_evidence: Wazuh dashboard open in a web browser showing the Security Configuration Assessment (SCA) module or scan results.

task_completion.description: Create a custom SCA policy file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing a YAML file being created or edited with Wazuh SCA policy syntax (e.g., containing 'policy:' and 'checks:' sections).

task_completion.description: Define at least 3 organization-specific security checks in the custom policy
task_completion.visual_evidence: The custom SCA YAML file shows a 'checks:' section with at least three distinct check blocks (e.g., multiple '- id: ...' entries for SSH, passwords, logging, etc.).

task_completion.description: Configure Wazuh manager to execute the custom policy
task_completion.visual_evidence: Editing the Wazuh manager configuration (e.g., ossec.conf in a terminal or via the Wazuh dashboard's configuration editor) to add a '<policy>' entry pointing to the newly created custom SCA YAML file within the '<sca>' block.

task_completion.description: Create the compliance gap analysis report at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor open showing a file saved exactly at '/home/ga/Desktop/compliance_report.txt'.

task_completion.description: Document reviewed checks, custom policy details, and remediation in a report of at least 500 characters
task_completion.visual_evidence: The compliance_report.txt file contains substantial text (visually appearing to be multiple paragraphs / >500 characters) discussing gaps, custom policy details, and remediation recommendations.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Wazuh dashboard and configuration files
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Wazuh web interface (https://localhost) and genuine configuration files being edited, rather than just mock text files.

integrity.description: The compliance report contains genuine analysis rather than a copy-paste of the prompt
integrity.visual_evidence: The text in compliance_report.txt looks like a generated report with specific details about the implemented checks, not just the exact wording of the task description.

integrity.description: The custom SCA policy appears to be a valid YAML structure
integrity.visual_evidence: The custom policy file uses proper YAML indentation and Wazuh SCA fields (id, title, description, condition, rules) rather than plain unstructured text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The custom SCA policy must contain at least 3 distinct checks. The compliance gap analysis report must be saved exactly to /home/ga/Desktop/compliance_report.txt and contain a minimum of 500 characters.
